title: pelargonium englerianum
intro: Pelargonium englerianum, also known as the 'Ring Finger Geranium', is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of colds, coughs, and sore throats due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium englerianum include its ability to soothe and calm respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
